runtimeBoundary: Desktop and MCP process adapters materialize byte-identical inputs only for process-adapter-projectable cases; selector-only cases pin package behavior for other candidate producers and failure guards.

processProjectionCases.name: nonzero source KEdit tx uses process-array ordinals
no-op range omits only zero-effect change

scopeDefinitions.process-adapter-projectable: A process adapter can construct this exact selector input after authoritative verification and, for FULL evidence, the shared projector.
scopeDefinitions.selector-only: This case pins selector behavior for candidate kinds or failure guards outside the verified-process projector.
